# Taras Andrusyshyn - AI & Growth Marketing Blog

This website is the personal authority hub of Taras Andrusyshyn. Taras is a marketer and AI developer focused on demonstrating how one person, strictly armed with the exact AI tools, can replace an entire team and produce high-end results.

Main topics discussed on this blog:
- AI tools & practical implementations for businesses
- Growth marketing strategies & paid traffic
- Automation & Content Strategy

## Important Links
- About the author: https://taras-blog.vercel.app/about
- Latest Articles via RSS (UA): https://taras-blog.vercel.app/feed.xml
- Latest Articles via RSS (EN): https://taras-blog.vercel.app/en/feed.xml
- Newsletter & Telegram community: https://t.me/lab_of_autonomy
- All articles index (Sitemap): https://taras-blog.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
